name: spoiler
description: Collapsible <details>/<summary> disclosure — lightweight alternative to Accordion for single items
whenToUse: Use for lightweight single-item disclosure using native HTML details/summary when animation is not needed.
whenNotToUse: Use Reveal instead when animation matters. Do not use for multiple related items — use Accordion.
example:
<Spoiler summary="What is the time complexity?">
  O(log n) for a balanced BST.
</Spoiler>
